utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: No . This is just part of a dare devil game that I play called wait until the last moment before I burst and die .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Jeez , man did you fall ... Hi ! So ah , did you , did ... did ... did you fall high ?

utterances.speaker: Woman
utterances.text: Someone was in the lady room , I could not wait . I left the lid up for you though .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: You know what Gunther , go ah , go ahead , I am ... I am talking to ah , . This is the part where you say your name .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Ginger . I am talking to Ginger , so ...

utterances.speaker: Ginger
utterances.text: Do not you have to use the bathroom ?

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Nope , nope , I would just ah , I would rather talk to you .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Yes , I do have to go to the bathroom .
